monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Three Nights of Strikes on Iran

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 24m ago. President Trump confirms US forces conducted three consecutive nights of airstrikes on Iran in response to attacks on commercial shipping, marking a major escalation.
Trump Says US Forces Destroyed Iran's Radar Network
— S3 · Political · Iran · 32m ago. President Trump claims US forces destroyed Iran's air surveillance radar network in recent operations, leaving Iran without effective air surveillance.
Israel Strikes Bint Jbeil District in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Bint Jbeil District, Lebanon · 3h ago. Israeli forces target the Bint Jbeil district in southern Lebanon, as reported by Lebanon's National News Agency.
